channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: AI Driving the future of UAE enterprises: 59% of business leaders plan to increase investment in advanced technologies
item.description: Innovation is naturally playing a key role in shaping the future enterprises, 59% of UAE business leaders say their investment in advanced technology will increase and 82% say that AI is already impacting what their organisation can achieve, while 45% state they will invest in advanced technologies
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Founder of failed crypto lending platform Celsius Network pleads guilty to fraud charges
item.description: The founder and former CEO of the failed cryptocurrency lending platform Celsius Network has pleaded guilty to federal fraud charges, admitting that he misled customers about the business.
item.dc:creator: Larry Neumeister, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Kotlin previews guard conditions in when expressions
item.description: JetBrains has released Kotlin 2.1.0, an update to the Kotlin programming language that previews guard conditions and has compiler updates offering flexibility around checks. Released November 27, Kotlin 2.1.0 can be installed as an update by following the instructions at kotlinlang.org. Kotlin 2.1.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: AI for lawyers: 10 tips to help integrate new tools into legal work
item.description: Lawyers tend to be the butt of jokes about not being human, so perhaps it’s no surprise that AI has been widely embraced in the legal world.
item.dc:creator: Richard Baguley, Fast Company

item.title: The BBC's Digital Transformation: A Step Forward with SAP and AWS
item.description: The BBC's partnership with SAP and Amazon Web Services (AWS) aims to transform its IT systems, impacting various departments such as Finance, HR, and Procurement.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: TikTok defends handling of Romania election content in grilling by EU lawmakers
item.description: BUCHAREST, Romania (AP) — TikTok took down several networks that tried to meddle in Romania's elections, executives said Tuesday as they defended the company's election integrity measures to European Union lawmakers.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN and STEPHEN McGRATH, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: AT&T sees earnings growth over next 3 years; eyes more than $40B in anticipated shareholder returns
item.description: AT&T anticipates earnings growth over the next three years thanks to the momentum of 5G and fiber services.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE CHAPMAN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Beyond Bank CIO: Balancing tradition and innovation in the digital age
item.description: Beyond Bank Australia is one of the largest customer-owned banks in Australia and one of the leading B Corps in the country. That certification measures your company’s social and environmental impact, both of which we’re super proud of, but it’s also deeply rooted in our culture.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: AWS Database Migration Service gets gen AI-powered schema conversion
item.description: Amazon Web Services (AWS) has updated its Database Migration Service’s schema conversion feature with a new generative AI-powered capability that automates schema conversion to a great extent.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Bipartisan bill would study AI's impact on banking, housing
item.description: A new bill with bipartisan support would commission studies on the use of artificial intelligence (AI) in the banking and housing sectors, where lawmakers have been sounding an alarm about algorithmic price fixing and commercial misconduct enabled by new technologies.
item.dc:creator: Tobias Burns, The Hill

item.title: It looks like Apple’s forthcoming M5 chips are all about AI
item.description: What processors will be running the Apple bargains we’ll be seeking to purchase on Cyber Monday 2025? Presumably, Apple’s M5 chips will be inside some of them, with work already under way on the next amazing Apple Silicon processor.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Intel CEO steps down as chipmaker falters, lays off staff
item.description: Intel CEO Pat Gelsinger has stepped down after a three-year stint leading the company, the chipmaker announced Monday. Two senior executives, David Zinsner and Michelle Johnston Holthaus, will take over as interim co-CEOs amid the search for a new chief executive.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Siberia's 'Gateway to Hell' crater fuels new fears
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says the Batagaika crater in Siberia expands 35 million cubic feet yearly due to thawing.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Australian Parliament bans social media for under-16s with world-first law
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — A social media ban for children under 16 passed the Australian Parliament on Friday in a world-first law.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
